headline: MSCI Expands Wealth Platform And Revamps ESG Scores As Investors Assess Value
summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) is partnering with Snowden Lane Partners to roll out the MSCI Wealth Manager platform across the advisory firm’s network. The company is also preparing significant updates to its ESG ratings models, including new buffer zones and changes that will affect scores for over a third of rated issuers. For you as an investor, these moves sit at the core of MSCI’s work in indexing, analytics and ESG tools that many professionals use to build and monitor portfolios. The Snowden Lane...

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider MSCI (MSCI) After Its Recent Valuation Checks?
summary: If you have been wondering whether MSCI is priced richly or still offers value, this article walks through what the numbers can and cannot tell you about the stock. MSCI recently closed at US$564.41, with returns of 1.2% over 30 days, a 1% decline over the last week, and gains of 4.9% over 1 year, 10.8% over 3 years, and 41.9% over 5 years. Recent coverage of MSCI has focused on its role as a key index and analytics provider and how investors use its benchmarks and tools to track markets and...

headline: How Is MSCI's Stock Performance Compared to Other Financial Service Stocks?
summary: While MSCI has outperformed relative to its peers over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook on its prospects.
